headline: This Week's Essential Skills, Tools & Data Tips for Management Consultants

stories.title: Master Emotional Intelligence (EQ) to Stand Out in 2026
stories.summary: EQ is lowkey becoming as important as Excel skills for management consultants—helps you connect with clients, manage teams, and navigate tough conversations without the awkward tension.
stories.takeaway: Start practicing active listening and emotional awareness. It's literally the soft skill that sets top-tier consultants apart from the rest in client meetings.

stories.title: Power Query Data Validation: Speed Up Your Analysis 10x
stories.summary: Forget manual data cleaning—Power Query's built-in transformations let you extract dates, text, and structured data without writing formulas. Game changer for consultants drowning in datasets.
stories.takeaway: Use Data Validation with Excel Tables to create dynamic drop-down lists. Saves massive amounts of time on data entry cleanup so you can actually focus on insights.

stories.title: Forecast: AI-Powered Resource Management for Consulting Teams
stories.summary: Forecast uses machine learning to predict project timelines, allocate resources smartly, and spot delivery risks before they blow up. Honestly, it's like having a built-in project manager bot.
stories.takeaway: If your firm's managing complex portfolios, Forecast gives real insight into utilization and risk that spreadsheets literally can't. Automates staffing decisions so teams aren't overloaded.

watchNext.title: ChatGPT as a Consulting Research Assistant
watchNext.why: ChatGPT is lowkey transforming how consultants structure workplans, summarize complex data, and accelerate problem-solving. Paired with domain expertise, it's fr a game-changer for faster research cycles.

watchNext.title: Strategic Thinking: Building 3-Year Growth Roadmaps
watchNext.why: Tbh, strategy frameworks like OGSM actually matter when you're aligning client strengths with market opportunities. Learning to facilitate workshops and filter low-impact initiatives will legit set you apart.
